message:
fix(tests): harden E2E TUI smoke tests and box-char detection

Improve reliability and correctness of TUI E2E tests:

- Recover from poisoned mutexes in tui_flow_guard() instead of panicking,
  preventing cascading test failures when one test panics mid-lock
- Add wait_for_output_growth() helper for PTY output detection that doesn't
  depend on fragile string matching ("Detail view", "Loading conversation")
- Switch detail-open tests from Enter (\r) to 'v' key (raw-detail modal),
  matching the actual TUI keybinding
- Add explicit child process liveness assertions after ESC keypresses to
  verify ESC closes overlays/modals without quitting the app
- Fix has_box_char closure in degradation test to check all four Unicode
  box-drawing corner characters (╭╮╰╯) instead of just ╭, preventing
  false negatives when border style varies

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
